Guess Who (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,915,888Details
International Box Office $33,200,000
Worldwide Box Office $102,115,888
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,671,446 (30.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,147 opening theaters/3,147 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $121,597,293

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 8th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 2nd, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sex-related humor.
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Interracial Romance, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, 3 Arts Entertainment, Tall Trees, Katalyst Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
